decisions.question: What is the per-tool cache file schema and staleness detection model?
decisions.chosen: Per-tool JSON files with .last-check sentinel for global staleness

decisions.question: How do the three trigger layers integrate with CheckUpdateStaleness and what is the spawn dedup protocol?
decisions.chosen: Package-level CheckAndSpawnUpdateCheck function with stat-flock-spawn protocol

decisions.question: What is the [updates] configuration surface?
decisions.chosen: Flat struct with getter methods matching LLMConfig pattern
